/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_pcap.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_pcap.dir/backend_pcap_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pcap.dir/dlt_pcap_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pcap.dir/mac_pcap_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pcap.dir/pcap_file_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pcap.dir/rlc_pcap_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pcap.dir/pcap_rlc_pdu_context.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_pcap.a
